channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Men's College Basketball Rankings: Florida in Top 5; Michigan State, Nebraska Jump
item.description: FOX Sports' Casey Jacobsen shares his latest men's college hoops rankings with Florida surging while Texas Tech and Gonzaga falling.

item.title: 2026 NFL Draft: Top 50 Prospects After the Scouting Combine
item.description: With the Scouting Combine in the rearview, here are Rob Rang's 50 best prospects in the 2026 NFL Draft.

item.title: Lionel Messi Tracker: Inter Miami Star Nets Season's First Goals In Comeback Win
item.description: Tracking Lionel Messi's goals and top moments for Inter Miami and the upcoming FIFA World Cup.

item.title: UCLA Women's Basketball Secures Undefeated Big Ten Record
item.description: No. 2 UCLA has completed the first undefeated regular season in Big Ten women's basketball in 11 years.

item.title: Women's College Basketball 2025-26 Undefeated Teams Tracker: UConn Goes Perfect
item.description: There is one Division I women's college basketball team that is still undefeated in the 2025-2026 season.

item.title: How many future Hall of Famers are playing in the 2026 WBC?
item.description: From the locks to the long shots to those in between, we count Cooperstown candidates in this year's World Baseball Classic.

item.title: Yamal is eclipsing young Ronaldo, Messi. Are Barça too dependent on him already?
item.description: Lamine Yamal's goal and assist stats are streets ahead of Lionel Messi, Cristiano Ronaldo and Kylian Mbappé at the same age. But is he playing too muc...

item.title: The four NHL teams that need a blockbuster trade before Friday's deadline
item.description: The coming days could seal the fates of these clubs -- one way or another.

item.title: Wyshynski's NHL trade tier rankings: Which big names could bring a Stanley Cup?
item.description: The playoff races have restarted, with many teams seeking to bolster their rosters for a deep run this spring.

item.title: Kiper's top standouts from the NFL combine: 13 prospects who helped their draft stock
item.description: Mel Kiper Jr. picked out 13 players who caught his attention during combine workouts, including Chris Brazzell II and Dani Dennis-Sutton.
